positive: A symmetrical, repeating celestial botanical mandala pattern. Detailed etching style linework depicting stylized lunar phases, glowing flora, and astronomical constellations interwoven like lace. Central composition, high contrast black and deep indigo ink palette with gold leaf accents, designed as an all-over print repeat suitable for screen printing on textiles. Clean silhouette focus, vibrant depth, ethereal, mystic, highly detailed, vector illustration quality, intricate pattern design, flat aesthetic.
